items.title: Disclosure Day shows the best, and worst, of what made Spielberg a legend
items.summary_auto: Mixing far-reaching — at times inscrutable — existential observations with both an alienating storytelling conceit and Stephen Spielberg's typical melodrama, his latest sci-fi thriller is a half-compelling, half-finished grab-bag of disconnected ideas.

items.title: Ariana Grande tells Trump administration to stop using her music for 'barbaric, inhumane, heinous nonsense'
items.summary_auto: American pop star Ariana Grande told U.S. President Donald Trump's administration on Thursday to stop using her music to promote its ‌policies.

items.title: Can men get breast cancer? X-Men star Tyler Mane didn't used to think so
items.summary_auto: The odds are slim — only one in 755 men will be diagnosed with this type of cancer in their lifetime. But X-Men star Tyler Mane says he's now among them.

items.title: Sean (Diddy) Combs sued by former child actor for alleged sexual assault
items.summary_auto: Sean (Diddy) Combs is being sued by an unnamed former child actor who alleges Combs sexually assaulted him at a Hollywood networking event in May 2007. The disgraced hip-hop mogul is currently serving a 50-month sentence in federal prison on prostitution-related charges.

items.title: 30 Canadian books to read this Pride Month and beyond
items.summary_auto: June is Pride Month! To celebrate, CBC Books is highlighting fiction, nonfiction, poetry and comics by 2SLGBTQ+ writers in Canada to add to your reading list this year.
